data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying navigation by limiting the number of choices per decision point.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes user journey mapping to streamline interactions.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Optimizing interface design to ensure quick and easy access to important controls.
data.technical_spec: User interface designed with accessible touchpoints and shortcuts.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creating an appealing user interface to improve user satisfaction and usability.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates appealing color schemes and clean design layouts.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting cognitive load by presenting information in manageable chunks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes content segmentation and modular layout designs.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designing consistent user experiences aligned with user expectations from other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Cross-platform design standards to align with user familiarity.
